title: Psadan (language)

'''Psadan''' was the language of the [[Psadan]] people from [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]]. The other intelligent species from Wayland, the [[Myneyrsh]], also used Psadan as a second language. Similarly, most Psadans were fluent in both Psadan and [[Myneyrsh (language)|Myneyrsh]] languages.<ref name="UAA" />

Psadan language consisted of grunts, groans and deep vocalizations. There was no written form of this language, so all the history of the Psadan people was kept orally.<ref name="UAA" />

{{Language-stub}}
